original_query: select s_name, s_address from supplier, nation where s_suppkey in ( select ps_suppkey from partsupp where ps_partkey in ( select p_partkey from part where p_name like 'spring%' ) and ps_availqty > ( select 0.5 * sum(l_quantity) from lineitem where l_partkey = ps_partkey and l_suppkey = ps_suppkey and l_shipdate >= date '1997-01-01' and l_shipdate < date '1997-01-01' + interval '1' year ) ) and s_nationkey = n_nationkey and n_name = 'KENYA' order by s_name;
rewritten_query:
WITH filtered_parts AS (
    SELECT p_partkey
    FROM part
    WHERE p_name LIKE 'spring%'
),
lineitem_agg AS (
    SELECT l_partkey, l_suppkey, 0.5 * SUM(l_quantity) AS half_sum
    FROM lineitem
    WHERE l_shipdate >= DATE '1997-01-01'
      AND l_shipdate < DATE '1997-01-01' + INTERVAL '1' YEAR
    GROUP BY l_partkey, l_suppkey
),
filtered_partsupp AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT ps.ps_suppkey
    FROM partsupp ps
    INNER JOIN filtered_parts fp ON ps.ps_partkey = fp.p_partkey
    INNER JOIN lineitem_agg la ON ps.ps_partkey = la.l_partkey AND ps.ps_suppkey = la.l_suppkey
    WHERE ps.ps_availqty > la.half_sum
)
SELECT s.s_name, s.s_address
FROM supplier s
INNER JOIN nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
INNER JOIN filtered_partsupp fp ON s.s_suppkey = fp.ps_suppkey
WHERE n.n_name = 'KENYA'
ORDER BY s.s_name;

rewrite_suggestion.produced_suggestion: Replaced nested correlated subqueries with CTEs to avoid repeated execution
Converted IN clauses to explicit INNER JOINs for better query planning
Pre-aggregated lineitem data to avoid recalculating the sum for each partsupp row
Used DISTINCT to eliminate duplicate supplier keys in the filtered_partsupp CTE
